title: Add Stripe Subscriptions and Billing Portal to Next.js
summary: Complete Stripe subscription integration — subscription Checkout, Customer Portal, webhook lifecycle events (created/updated/deleted), and database sync for subscription state.
declaration: I will integrate Stripe recurring subscriptions into this Next.js project. This covers subscription checkout, the hosted Billing Portal for customers to manage or cancel, and webhook handlers for subscription lifecycle events. If you only need one-time payments, use the Stripe Checkout skill instead.
